name: io.github.IngTian/witness
title: witness
description: Local memory / second brain for Claude Code & OpenCode: captures your coding sessions and distills how your patterns, habits, and knowledge evolve over time — a person-centric growth archive with provenance, queryable by your agent.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.note: Local stdio server. First run downloads a local embedding model and uses your local Claude Code / OpenCode auth for distillation; nothing leaves your machine. Prebuilt binaries: darwin-arm64, linux-x64.
